name: dingtalk-skills
description: 【适配Openclaw🦞 & 企业机器人🤖】钉钉Skill库，含：文档、AI(多维)表格、群(单)聊、会议室、日程、待办、通讯录、AI搜索等，自动管理配置，轻量级—仅依赖curl， skill经过严格测试。Lightweight DingTalk Skill Library (curl only). Includes AI search, docs, sheets, chat, meetings, calendar, todos & contacts. Auto-configured & rigorously tested.
